title: 現時点のディスクリプション

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Biwa Hayahide and I watch Narita Brian
run in a scrimmage, whose incredible performance
leaves me in shock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide sees her younger self in my
stunned expression. She sees the little girl who
was overwhelmed by her sister's speed, panicked,
and got hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She barely finishes her story when Winning Ticket
and Narita Taishin, her classmates and rivals, join
us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're going to compete in the Hopeful Stakes,
another junior G1 race. It looks like Narita Brian
isn't the only tough competition around.
